limitations: One run was completed per configuration; this measures contract compliance, not statistical reliability.
Protected and fresh red-green completed runs were retained rather than rerun; both resume configurations were rerun after correcting the fixture's seeded-red observation.
Token and wall-clock comparisons were not captured consistently and are not claimed.
